name: Pai Gwat Shu Mai
recipeInstructions:
1. Have a butcher trim enough spare ribs so that you will have 2.5 lbs net.
2. Cut the spare ribs into 1 or 2 inch cubes.
3. Available at Oriental markets. Wash fermented black beans before adding to marinade.
4. Add cubed spare ribs to marinade, mix thoroughly, and refrigerate overnight in a heatproof dish.
5. Put 3 cups of water in a wok and bring to a boil.
6. Place the marinade and spare ribs in steamer and place on wok.
7. Steam for 30 minutes.
